skills.name: Vengeful Slash
skills.description: Single-target slash, builds 1 Grudge Mark stack, max 3

skills.name: Crimson Reprisal
skills.description: Large AoE slash, heals per enemy hit

skills.name: Practice Slash
skills.description: Basic training slash — builds combat fundamentals

skills.name: Wide Sweep
skills.description: Slow arc that hits multiple targets

skills.name: Grudge Shot
skills.description: Single shot, builds Powder Mark. Hitscan 30m range.

skills.name: Quick Reload
skills.description: Rapidly cycle the chamber, +40% attack speed for 4s

skills.name: Smoke Shot
skills.description: Fire a flashbang round, blinding enemies in 4m

skills.name: Explosive Round
skills.description: Fire incendiary shell that explodes on impact

skills.name: Flame Burst
skills.description: Spray ignited powder in a cone, setting ground ablaze

skills.name: Sniper Round
skills.description: Steady aim, charged shot that pierces armor at extreme range

skills.name: Hellfire Barrage
skills.description: Unload entire magazine in sustained fire, AoE incendiary

skills.name: Crimson Blast
skills.description: Blood-infused shell that heals on hit, AoE splash

skills.name: Shadow Shot
skills.description: Void-touched round that silences on impact and leaves darkness

skills.name: Cannon Execute
skills.description: Overcharged shot that deals 3x damage to targets below 25% HP

skills.name: Demon Blast
skills.description: Channel dark energy into the barrel, releasing a massive explosion that sends enemies flying

skills.name: Thunder Blast
skills.description: Summon a lightning storm through the barrel, chain-electrocuting all enemies in range

skills.name: Wrath of the Tempest
skills.description: massive AoE: call down 12 lightning bolts in a 15m area over 4s, each dealing 200% weapon damage

skills.name: Inferno Incarnate
skills.description: transform into a fire demon for 12s: +50% all stats, all attacks deal AoE fire, immune to CC

skills.name: General's Decree
skills.description: for 15s: all allies deal +30% damage, take -20% damage, and regenerate 2% HP/s

skills.name: Wrath of the Wilds
skills.description: massive nature explosion: 20m AoE, enemies take 300% weapon damage and are rooted for 4s, allies heal 30% max HP

skills.name: Rune Apocalypse
skills.description: at 10 stacks: unleash all runes as homing projectiles dealing 500% total weapon damage split across all enemies in 20m

skills.name: Demon Lord's Wrath
skills.description: transform the battlefield: 20m zone of darkness for 10s, you gain +60% damage, enemies are blinded and slowed 40%

skills.name: Ghost Executioner
skills.description: enter permanent stealth for 8s, each attack from stealth deals +100% damage and doesn't break stealth

skills.name: Thundergod's Judgment
skills.description: leap 15m into the air, slam down with cosmic force: 20m AoE, 400% weapon damage, all enemies stunned 3s

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description: channel 3s: entire screen shakes, all enemies in 25m take 300% damage and are stunned 4s, terrain cracks open dealing DoT

skills.name: Crusader's Light
skills.description: massive holy nova: 15m AoE, heal all allies 40% max HP, damage all enemies 200%, undead take 400%

skills.name: Manifest Destiny
skills.description: for 15s: all attacks pierce through enemies, crit chance +30%, kills extend duration by 3s

skills.name: Royal Decree
skills.description: 20m AoE: allies gain +25% all stats, enemies are slowed 50% and deal -20% damage for 10s

skills.name: Supernova
skills.description: charge for 2s, release a massive light explosion: 25m AoE, 350% damage, blinds 5s, heals allies 20% max HP

skills.name: Arcane Apotheosis
skills.description: ascend for 10s: float above ground, all spells cost 0 mana, +50% spell damage, +30% cast speed

skills.name: Army of the Dead
skills.description: raise 8 powerful undead warriors + 1 skeletal champion for 20s, all inheriting 50% of your stats

skills.name: Retribution
skills.description: discharge ALL remaining mana as a single blast: 1 mana = 5 damage, 30m range, unavoidable

skills.name: Omniscience
skills.description: for 12s: you can cast any class skill from any class at +30% effectiveness, mana costs halved

skills.name: Storm of Arrows
skills.description: ascend on wind, hover for 5s firing homing arrows at all enemies in 30m — 1 arrow per enemy per second, each dealing 100% weapon damage

skills.name: Warchief's Fury
skills.description: enter a 12s frenzy: +50% attack speed, each hit applies a random debuff — bleed, stun, slow, or fear

mechanic.description: Toggle F (block) — shield type replaces mainhand slots 1–3 with tank abilities. Slots 4–5 unchanged.

skills.name: Enduring Wall

skills.description: 5% of damage taken reflected while blocking

skills.description: Charge with shield — knock enemies aside

skills.description: Break enemy buff on perfect block

skills.description: Fire dragon head — breathe fire cone

skills.name: Grudge Taunt

skills.name: Aegis of Carnage

skills.name: Wraith Barrage
skills.description: unleash all stored parry-energy as rapid spectral strikes

skills.name: Broken Covenant
skills.description: massive anti-magic zone, all enemy spells fail for 4s

skills.name: Last of the Line

mechanic.description: Toggle F (same as shield) — with a 1H mainhand, tome replaces mainhand slots 1–3 with coupled spell variants. Slots 4–5 unchanged.
